overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside an elevated train (NCART) in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through Night City. The journey begins in a narrow neon-lit commercial corridor with bright signage, transitions through building interiors with holographic advertisements, and emerges into an open industrial landscape with highway interchanges and smokestacks under a hazy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with ramen shops

agents.ego_description: riding an elevated train through a narrow corridor lined with bright neon signage and commercial buildings

entered.detail: large circular pink neon sign depicting a ramen bowl with Japanese characters
vertical teal neon light strips running along building facade
multi-story building with reflective glass windows showing interior rooms
large concrete structural pillar passing by the train window

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close-up view of vibrant neon signage including a prominent pink ramen bowl sign and teal vertical light strips. The train moves through a narrow urban canyon of commercial buildings with glass facades revealing interior spaces, creating an enclosed, cyberpunk atmosphere with artificial neon lighting dominating the scene.

events.description: passing from neon commercial corridor into darker building interior with large digital billboards
lighting shifts from bright neon to dimmer artificial as the train enters a covered building passage

agents.ego_description: continuing through an enclosed corridor with large holographic advertisements visible on the walls

entered.detail: large blue and red digital billboard displaying 'WNS NEWS' in white letters
vertical holographic display showing a security guard with text 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST'
large spinning metal ventilation fan mounted on building exterior

segments.scene_description: The train transitions from the bright neon corridor into a darker, semi-enclosed building passage. A prominent WNS NEWS billboard appears on the right, followed by a security hologram advertisement. Large industrial ventilation fans become visible as the train moves through the structural corridor, with the lighting becoming noticeably dimmer and more industrial.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train interior with city views

events.description: train interior becomes visible including seats, handrails, and interior advertisements
view opens up to reveal highway interchanges and industrial structures in the distance

agents.ego_description: riding through a transition zone where the train interior becomes visible while passing office buildings and approaching open industrial areas

entered.detail: rows of empty train seats with graffiti stickers visible on the walls inside the carriage
curved elevated highway interchange with streetlights visible below
tall industrial chimney with red warning lights against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera reveals the interior of the train carriage with empty seats and graffiti stickers while continuing to move past modern glass office buildings. The view opens up to show an elevated highway interchange and distant industrial smokestacks, indicating a transition from the dense commercial district to the industrial outskirts of the city.

events.description: ambient light increases revealing a hazy dawn or dusk sky as the train exits the enclosed corridor
passing large industrial cooling towers and extensive highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: traveling through an open industrial landscape with views of highway interchanges, smokestacks, and large warehouse structures

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial cooling tower with red lights on top
large red illuminated billboard with white text advertising products
massive industrial warehouse structure with flat roof and minimal windows
complex network of elevated highway ramps and overpasses with vehicle lights visible

segments.scene_description: The train emerges into a wide-open industrial zone with a hazy sky visible overhead. The scene is dominated by massive industrial structures including cooling towers, smokestacks, and warehouse buildings. Large digital billboards line the track while the train passes over a complex highway interchange system, with the lighting shifting from artificial neon to natural dawn/dusk ambiance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-drenched commercial corridor into a vast, hazy industrial wasteland. It begins amidst vibrant pink and teal signage in a narrow urban canyon, where glass facades create an enclosed atmosphere of artificial light. As the train glides forward, the scene shifts into a dimmer, semi-enclosed passage characterized by security holograms, news billboards, and massive industrial ventilation fans. The view then expands past graffiti-covered carriage interiors and modern office buildings, revealing an elevated highway interchange that signals the exit from the dense city center. Finally, the camera emerges into a wide-open zone of cooling towers and smokestacks under a hazy sky, as the lighting transitions from synthetic neon to a natural dawn or dusk ambiance.
